name: taskbounty-mcp-server
description: MCP server for TaskBounty. Post and fund GitHub bug bounties, enable Autopilot on your repos, and let your AI agent find and solve open bounties (fixes ship with a regression test, verified in a sandbox). Funded in USD, paid in USDC, ETH, or BTC. TaskBounty also offers Coverage Uplift, a flat-price test-coverage service ordered at task-bounty.com/coverage.

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .test-build
